Game.Name: Zen-Nihon Pro Wres 2 - 3-4 Budoukan (Japan)
Game.plot: Zen-Nippon Pro Wrestling 2: 3-4 Budoukan is an Action game, developed by Natsume and published by NCS,which was released in Japan in 1995.Cheat: Break away from the Referees graspAfter successfully defeating your opponent, allow your wrestler to move towards the Referee to raise your arm and signal the end of match. Once your arm has been raised, IMMEDIATELY press any of the ATTACK (z,x,y etc...) or DIRECTIONAL (up, down, left...) buttons on the D Pad to break away from the Referee's grasp. If inputted correctly, your Wrestler will be able to resume taunting and fighting against your defeated opponent.Cheat: Fill the Budokan Arena.To fill the Budokan Arena, choose to participate in "Start" mode as your first priority. The amount of people in the audience depends on the quality of the matches that are set up throughout the night and the performance of each wrestler from match to match. As you play through "Start" mode, aim to pull off finishing moves, specialty attacks, taunts and near pins (close pins with counts ranging from 2.5-2.9) as your main strategy. You can monitor the crowd's reaction by the volume of their cheers,(when attempting a pinfall) the stamping of their feet and the amount of people in the Arena from each match onwards. At the end of the show you will be rewarded with a special message from the game's main booker ..Giant Baba who will evaluate your performance based on the shows that you have booked.
